---
name: Language plugin request
about: Request support for a new programming language
title: "[Language] Add support for "
labels: language-support
assignees: ""
---

## Language

Name and version (e.g. Ruby 3.x, Rust, PHP 8).

## Common env var patterns

How are environment variables typically accessed in this language?

```ruby
# Examples:
ENV["DATABASE_URL"]
ENV.fetch("API_KEY")
```

## Files / extensions

What file extensions should be scanned? (e.g. `.rb`, `.rake`)

## Are you willing to contribute a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to implement this
- [ ] No, just requesting
